# Demo sources — ingest these to see batch ingestion with mixed source types.
# Each line is a URL or file path; blank lines and # comments are ignored.
# Run: synthadoc ingest --file sources.txt

# YouTube: "Early Computing: Crash Course Computer Science #1" (PBS Digital Studios)
# Covers Hollerith, Babbage, Lovelace, and early programmable machines.
# Auto-generated captions are available — confirmed stable since 2017.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=O5nskjZ_GoI

# YouTube Short: computing history clip
https://www.youtube.com/shorts/1P6yISuVgmA

# PDF: arxiv paper (demonstrates URL-based PDF ingestion)
https://arxiv.org/pdf/1903.12221
